overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character in 18th-century colonial dress walking through a historical New Orleans-style town. The character navigates narrow cobblestone market streets, transitions through an alley into an open town square with festival decorations, and approaches a grand cathedral flanked by cannons.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone market street with wooden stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow cobblestone market street, navigating between wooden stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in green coat walking ahead of the character
woman in dark dress standing near wooden barrels

entered.detail: large wooden cart with spoked wheels parked on the street
two-story red brick building with wooden shutters and barred windows
wooden stall with beige canvas awning displaying goods
stack of round wooden barrels against the building wall
tall palm tree visible above the roofline

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow cobblestone street lined with market stalls. Wooden wagons and barrels line the right side while canvas stalls occupy the left. NPCs in period clothing walk in opposing directions, creating a moderate crowd density in this enclosed market corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley between brick buildings leading to open square

events.description: exits narrow alley into open town square with wooden stage visible

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alley between brick buildings, emerging into the open square

notable_agents.action: woman in brown dress walking across the path from left to right
man in dark clothing walking toward the character

entered.detail: large stone cathedral with twin towers visible in the distance
raised wooden platform with roof structure and stairs

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a tighter alley between brick buildings before emerging into a more open area. The colonial cathedral becomes visible in the distance, and a wooden stage structure appears on the left as the ground transitions from cobblestone to dirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with festival decorations and wooden structures

events.description: passing wooden stage with colorful festival banners and decorations

agents.ego_description: crossing the open town square, passing wooden stage structures and festival decorations

notable_agents.action: woman in pink dress walking toward the character
group of NPCs gathered near the wooden stage

entered.detail: large red-painted wooden building with multiple windows and loading dock
large beige canvas tent erected in the square
purple, yellow, and green decorative banners strung between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the open town square, passing a wooden stage on the left and colorful festival decorations hanging overhead. Canvas tents and a large red warehouse line the path while the cathedral grows larger in the center view.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal cathedral towers against the bright sky

agents.ego_description: approaching the cathedral, walking between two large cannons, then looking up at the towers

entered.detail: two large red artillery cannons on wooden carriages flanking the approach
patch of dry yellow grass and dirt in the cathedral forecourt

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the grand cathedral, walking between two prominent cannons in the foreground. The camera tilts upward to emphasize the cathedral's twin towers against the bright sky, while the surrounding festival structures and tents fall away behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crowded, narrow market street into a wide, festive town square dominated by a grand cathedral. It begins by weaving through a cobblestone corridor lined with canvas stalls, wooden wagons, and barrels, moving amidst a crowd of people in period clothing. As the character enters a tighter brick alley, the enclosed space suddenly opens up and the ground transitions from stone to dirt, revealing a distant cathedral and a wooden stage. The scene then expands across the open square, passing under colorful festival decorations and beside canvas tents and a large red warehouse. Finally, the camera glides between two prominent cannons in the foreground and tilts upward to emphasize the cathedral's twin towers against the bright sky.
